messages.text: Spotlight: Houston’s Omalicha Kitchen is a favorite for weekend tables on AfriTable.
New Addition: Welcome Dukunoo Jamaican Kitchen to the AfriTable family in Miami.

steps.title: Discover
steps.description: We vet every restaurant for quality and authenticity. No more guessing.

steps.title: Reserve
steps.description: See open times, pick a table size, and confirm in a few taps. Partner restaurants sync real capacity when they’re on AfriTable.

steps.title: Celebrate
steps.description: Join a community that values the stories behind the spices.

promise.title: The AfriTable Promise
promise.description: We're not just a booking platform—we're a movement. Every reservation supports authentic diaspora-owned businesses and preserves culinary heritage. When you book with us, you're investing in the communities that make these flavors possible.
